epigraph.quote: Lots of fruit bushes, mini plums, which Eve picked while Simon washed up.

moments.quote: Amazing view from hill (an Iron Age fort?) of Bredon, Malvern + Cotswolds.
we drove on, [?Rom Salt Road from] [?Pershore] to the Cottage of Content pub

moments.place: Cottage of Content, Barton, Bidford-on-Avon, Warwickshire, UK
moments.quote: He said England (£75 p.w) were playing Macedonia (£1500 p.w) = 0:0.
Bideford has an old Mediaeval Bridge, + cars parked to watch children playing foot ball.
